title: Engineers Delight
description: adds a bit more integration between Farmers Delight and Immersive Engineering.
body:
Although Farmers Delight has some basic integration with Immersive Engineering already, I felt like it was missing some things.



This mod adds the following:

- Tomato Sauce, a fluid gained from putting Tomatoes in a Squeezer, can be served into a bowl with the Bottling Machine.
- Melon Juice, a fluid gained from putting Melons or Melon Slices in a squeezer, can be bottled with the Bottling Machine.
- Apple Cider, a fluid gained from putting Apples, Sugar and Ethanol in a Mixer, can be bottled with the Bottling Machine.
- Transforming Compost into Rich Soil by using the Bottling Machine filled with water.
- Use Rich Soil inside Garden Cloches (only for crops added by Immersive Engineering, Farmers Delight and the Vanilla ones) to increase yields.
- Cut Cake and Pies into slices with the Metal Press.
- Cut Wheat Dough into Raw Pasta with the Metal Press.




If there's enough interest in this kind of industrialized cooking, I might consider adding support for more of the many Farmers Delight Addons into this mod. (suggestions are welcome, just leave a comment!)
